titleStmt.title: SII 24.61: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 61. (A.R. No. 124 of 1947-48.) III PRĀKĀRA, WEST WALL.

summary.p: Registers a sale of land in Viḷattūr-nāḍu under orders of Nishadarājar, the Śrīkāryam of the temple to Ulaguyyakkoṇḍaruḷiṉa ••••• ya Śembiyār alias Nēriyaṉ-Mādēvi, daughter of Pāṇḍiyaṉār for a garden to be raised in her name and for payment of specified amount of paddy to the temple from out of the produce. Dated in the 15th regnal year of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pukaḻ cūḻn=ta puṇaril Akaḻ cūḻn=ta puviyil ponṉemiyaḷavun tannemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattuc cakkarakoṭṭattu vikkira mattoḻilāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvaraiyiṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri Ayar muṉaik kon=taḷa Araicar tan=taḷam Iriya vāḷuṟai kaḻittu toḷvali kāṭṭi poṟppari naṭātti kirttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākai cūṭi tenṟicai temaru kamalap pūmakaḷ potumaiyum ponṉi Āṭaiyum naṉnilappāvaiyum
(naṉilap pāvaiyum) tanimaiyum taviravantu punitaṟ tiru maṇimakuṭam Urimaiyil cūṭi tanṉaṭi Iraṇṭum taṭamuṭiyākat tonṉila ventar cūṭa munṉai manuvāṟu peruka kaliyāṟu vaṟuppa ceṅkol ticaitoṟuñ cella veṇkuṭai Irunila viḷākam veṇkaṇun tenātu tiruniḻal veṇṇilāt tikaḻa Orutani meruvilp puliviḷaiyāṭa vārkaṭalttivān=tarattu pūpālar tiṟai viṭutan=ta kalañcorikaḷiṟu muṟai niṟppa vilaṅkiya tenṉavan karuntalai paruntalaittiṭa tanpon
ṉakar puṟattiṭai kiṭappa vinnāḷ piṟkulap piṟaipol niṟppiḻaiyennuñ col letir koṭiṟṟallatu tan kai villetir koṭā vikkalan kallatar naṅkili tuṭaṅki maṇavūr naṭuvenat tuṅkapattiraiyaḷavuṟṟu veṅkaṇum paṭṭa veṅkaḷiru viṭṭa tan mānamum kūṟiya viramum kiṭappa Eṟiṉa malaikaḷum mutuku neḷippu Iḻin=ta netikaḷuñ cuḻanṟuṭaintoṭa viḻun=ta kaṭalkaḷum talaivirittalamara kuṭai ticai tannāḷukantu tānum tāṉaiyum pannāḷiṭṭa palapala mutukum payan
tetir māṟi jayapperuntiruvum paḻiyukantu kuṭutta pukaḻuñ celviyum vāḷā viṭṭa maṭantayariṭṭa mu miḷātu kuṭutta veṅkari niṟaiyum kaṅkamaṇṭalamum ciṅkaṇam menṉum pāṇi Iraṇṭum Oru vicaik koṇṭu yīṇṭiya pukaḻḻoṭum pāṇṭi (maṇṭi) maṇṭalam koḷḷat tiruvuḷḷattuṭattu veḷḷa paruttaraṅkamum tantira vāriyum Uṭaittāy vantu vaṭa kaṭal ten kaṭal pāyvatu polat tan peruñ ceṉaiyai Ēvip pañcavar Ayvaraiyum poru
ta(poruta) markkaḷattañci veruneḷit toṭi Araṇenappukka kāṭaṟattuṭaittu nāṭaṭi jayastampa nticaitoṟu niṟutti mut tin calāpamu muttamiḻp potiyilum veṅkaripaṭumaiyyac caiyyamum kanṉiyum kaik koṇṭaruḷi tenṉāṭṭellai kāṭṭiya kaṭal malai nāṭṭuḷḷa cāveṟellām tani vicum peṟa(ṟi) māveṟiya tan varutanit talaivaraik kurukular kulaiyak koṭṭāṟuṭpaṭa neṟito
ṟum nilaikaḷḷiṭṭaruḷit tiram koḷ virasiṅhāsanantiriya viṭṭaruḷi poṅkoḷi yāramum tiruppuyattalaṅkaḷum pola viramum tiyākamum viḷaṅka pārmicai me valar vaṇaṅka viṟṟirun=taruḷiya kovirājakesaripanmarāna cakravattikaḷ śrīkolottu ṅka coḻadevaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 5 Āvatu Āḻvār tiruvaraṅkadevaṟkku śrī kāriyañ ceykiṟa Atikārikaḷ niṣatarājar Evalpaṭi śrīvayiṣṇavavāriyam cempiyanmātevi Aḻakiya maṇavāḷanampiyum perumpuliyūr tiru
vāykkulamuṭaiyā nampiyum coḻakulamāṇikkattu cirāma nampiyum varakūr ceṇpaka nampiyum kāñcikkuṟi vaṭakopuramu yum śrīvīranārā yaṇattu Āyanum śrīpaṇṭāravāriyam Āritan tiruvāykkulamuṭaiyān cirākavanum Āritan kurukaikāvalannu n kecuvan taniiḷañciṅkamum kūttan tiruveṅkaṭamum kecuvan Aṟivāriyānum Ārāvamutu cirāmanum [ sabhai] kkaṇakku perumpuṟakkaṭal vāmanaṉun periyakoyil piriyanum śrī vaiṣṇavakaṇakku tiruvaraṅka
Ārā Amutāna patineṭṭu nāṭṭu śrīvayiṣṇavappiriyanum Ivvaṉaivom pāṇṭiyanār makaḷ Ulakuyyak(koyya) koṇṭaruḷina cempiyārāna neriyan māteviyarkku tirunan=tavanappuṟamāka Aṭuttuk kuṭutta tirumaṭaip paḷḷi nāṭṭu viḷattūr nāṭṭuk kaṟkuṭi nilam nūṟu samvassaram Uttecappaṭi payir ceyya Uṇṇātāy kiṭan=ta nilattil kiḻpāṟ kellai cavam pokum vatikku meṟkum tenpāṟ kellaiBelow the line.kolottuṅka coḻa viḷākattukku
vaṭakkum mipāṟkkellai nititoṅka viḷākattukkum ki(ḻa)ḻai maṇṇilaikkum yan vāyk ku nānkellaiyil Uṭpaṭṭa nilattil teṟk kaṭai(y)n=ta nilam Araiyum Añcu samvaṟsarattil tiruttaṟatti Eṇkalamāka paḷḷikoṇṭān marakkā(lma)lāl Aḷakkakaṭavomākavum Iṟai mikiti koṇṭu neriyanmāteviyār tirunan=tavāna(ta)ttukkup paṇi ceyyum Āḷukku jīvitamāka Aṭuttukkuṭuttom tiruvācalil pon=ta
kuṭimaiyum ceyyakkaṭavār Allātār Ākavum kāverikkulaiyum cennir veṭṭi sabhaikaṇakku perumpūṟkkaṭal vāmanaṉāna poṟ koyil piriyan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai śrīvaiyiṣṇava ttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven varakūr ceṇpakanārāyaṇa nampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven perumpuliyūr tiru ṭaiyā nampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven cempiyanmātevi Aḻakiya maṇavāḷa nampi Eḻuttu Irākū
kkuṇa vaṭakopuramuṭaiyān Eḻuttu coḻa kula māṇikkattil cirāmanampi Eḻuttu śrī ttu Āritan kurukai kāvalan Ārā Amutin Eḻuttu Āritan tiruvāykkulamuṭaiyān śrīrākavan Eḻuttu Āritan kecuvan taniiḷañciṅkam Eḻuttu kūttan tiruveṅkiṭam Eḻuttu kecuvan Aṟa Eḻuttu Ārā Amutu Eḻuttu Itu śrī vaiṣṇavarakṣai
Digital edition of SII 24.61 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
